gigapan.description:
Archive of popular Austrian Music(?)

I have been struggling to collect good meta data (descriptions, GPS points, contact info) to go with my GigaPans here in Vienna, and here I have failed.  Someone please add comments or email me at rich.gibson@gmail.com and I will exted this entry and add ins!
